name: Personal OS Lens
purpose: Identify patterns, workflows, and systems that improve a personal operating system for knowledge, execution, and agent collaboration.
questions: Does this improve capture, organization, or retrieval?
Does this improve execution workflows between human and agents?
Does this improve knowledge compounding over time?
Is this realistic for a solo builder or small team?
Would this reduce friction or cognitive load materially?
ignoreRules: Generic productivity advice with no concrete system design
Ideas requiring enterprise scale to be useful
Novelty with no repeatable workflow value
Pure inspiration with no operational pattern
